title: The Killing of Muhammad b. Ibrahim b. Mus 'ab and How It Took Place
description: How It Took Place I have been informed by more than one authority that when Muhammad b. Ishaq b. Ibrahim's father, Ishaq, learned that Muhammad was an insatiable glutton, who demanded exorbitant amounts of food, Ishaq sent a message summoning him.349 Ishaq ordered Muhammad to eat, explaining, "I want to see how you consume food." He devoured a quantity that astounded Ishaq. Then, when it seemed that he had reached his surfeit, a roast lamb was served, which he ravaged until only the bones remained.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 34
